segments.text_en: Adornment and self-praise at the sheepfold
evidence: She put the cu-gura, the desert crown, on her head
when she went out to the shepherd, to the sheepfold
her genitals were remarkable
She praised herself, full of delight at her genitals

segments.text_en: Resolve to beautify herself and coax Enki
evidence: when I have made ...... perfect, when I have made ...... luxuriant
I shall direct my steps to the abzu, to Eridug
I shall direct my steps to Enki, to the abzu, to Eridug
I myself shall speak coaxingly to Enki, in the abzu, in Eridug

segments.text_en: Declared plea and grievance of neglect
evidence: I, Inana, personally intend to go to the abzu
I shall utter a plea to the lord Enki
who will ...... for my holy ...... perfume?
It shall never escape me that I have been neglected by him who has had sex

segments.text_en: Journey to Eridug and Enki's foreknowledge
evidence: the maiden Inana, holy Inana, directed her steps all by herself towards Enki's abzu in Eridug
who knows the divine powers in heaven and earth
knew all about her enterprise
Come here, my man, listen to my words

segments.text_en: Enki's hospitality instructions
evidence: offer her butter cake to eat
Pour beer for her, in front of the Lions Gate
make her feel as if she is in her girlfriend's house
You are to welcome holy Inana at the holy table, at the table of An

segments.text_en: Isimud performs the welcome
evidence: she got butter cake to eat
they gave her beer to drink, in front of the Lions Gate
He made her feel as if she was in her girlfriend's house
He welcomed holy Inana at the holy table, at the table of An

segments.text_en: The beer-drinking contest begins
evidence: Enki and Inana were drinking beer together in the abzu
enjoying the taste of sweet wine
The bronze aga vessels were filled to the brim
the two of them started a competition, drinking from the bronze vessels of Urac

segments.text_en: Enki bestows the divine powers (me)
evidence: I will give them to holy Inana, my daughter
Holy Inana received heroism, power, wickedness, righteousness, the plundering of cities
In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu
Holy Inana received strife, triumph, counselling, comforting, judging, decision-making

segments.text_en: Inana enumerates the powers received
evidence: He has given me righteousness. He has given me the plundering of cities
He has given me the craft of the carpenter
He has given me wisdom. He has given me attentiveness
He has given me strife. He has given me triumph. He has given me counselling

segments.text_en: Enki sobers as the Boat of Heaven departs
evidence: holy Inana had gathered up the divine powers and embarked onto the Boat of Heaven
The Boat of Heaven had already left the quay
as the effects of the beer cleared from father Enki who had drunk beer
King Enki turned his attention to Eridug

segments.text_en: Enki inventories the missing powers with Isimud
evidence: Where are the office of en priest, the office of lagal priest, divinity, the great and good crown, the royal throne?
My master has given them to his daughter
Where are the office of egi-zi priestess, the office of nin-dijir priestess
Where are the standard, the quiver, sexual intercourse, kissing, prostitution

segments.text_en: The obscure frog ritual interlude
evidence: By the bolt of the temple door, a frog spoke
Enki grasped the frog by his right paw
He gave ...... to the bird of heaven
He gave ...... to the fish of the subterranean waters

segments.text_en: First pursuit: the enkum sent after the boat
evidence: The enkum are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
Inana may travel to Unug, but you are to get the Boat of Heaven back to Eridug for me
How could my father have changed what he said to me?
he got the enkum to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven

segments.text_en: Second pursuit: the fifty giants of Eridug
evidence: So Inana got hold again of the divine powers which had been presented to her, and the Boat of Heaven
The fifty giants of Eridug are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
Has he duplicitously sent you to me as a messenger?
he got the fifty giants of Eridug to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven

segments.text_en: Third pursuit: the fifty lahama
evidence: for the third time the prince spoke to his minister Isimud
The fifty lahama of the subterranean waters are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
he got the fifty lahama of the subterranean waters to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven
Come, my good minister of E-ana!

segments.text_en: Fourth pursuit: all the great fish
evidence: for the fourth time the prince spoke to his minister Isimud
All the great fish together ...... are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
It has just now reached the Field Hill
he got all the great fish together ...... to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven

segments.text_en: Fifth pursuit: the guardians of Unug
evidence: for the fifth time the prince spoke to his minister Isimud
the guardians of Unug, are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
he got the ......, the guardians of Unug, to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven
Water has never touched your hand, water has never touched your feet!

segments.text_en: Sixth pursuit: the Id-surungal
evidence: for the sixth time the prince spoke to his minister Isimud
The Id-surungal ...... are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
It has just now reached the Id-surungal
he got the Id-surungal ...... to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven

segments.text_en: Seventh attempt fails and the boat nears Unug
evidence: So Inana got hold again of the divine powers which had been presented to her, and the Boat of Heaven
A seventh time ......
Holy Inana ...... the Boat of Heaven
Holy Inana at that time ......

segments.text_en: Nincubur announces arrival at the Gate of Joy
evidence: today you have brought the Boat of Heaven to the Gate of Joy, to Unug Kulaba
Now there will be rejoicing in our city
...... barges on our river ......

segments.text_en: Inana proclaims the festival of triumph
evidence: Today I have brought the Boat of Heaven to the Gate of Joy, to Unug Kulaba
The king shall slaughter bulls, shall sacrifice sheep
The foreign lands shall declare my greatness
My people shall utter my praise

segments.text_en: The boat docks and the powers reach Unug
evidence: it passed magnificently along the street
It reached the maiden's house
...... the purified well, her principal well
Holy Inana ...... the Boat of Heaven ......

segments.text_en: Enki tracks the boat to the White Quay
evidence: Where has the Boat of Heaven reached now?
It has just now reached the White Quay
Go now, ...... admiration
...... admiration ...... the Boat of Heaven

segments.text_en: Full inventory confirmed as brought to Unug
evidence: you have brought with you the office of en priest, you have brought with you the office of lagal priest
you have brought with you the great and good crown, you have brought with you the royal throne
you have brought with you sexual intercourse, you have brought with you kissing
you have brought with you the holy tigi, holy lilis, ub, meze and ala drums

segments.text_en: Inana names the quays and places
evidence: she named it with the name "The house Ganzer is rebuilt"
Where the trader said "Fifty shekels" but when he brought (?) it there was less
she named that place with the name "White Quay"
she named that place with the name "Blue Quay"

segments.text_en: Enki's conciliatory establishment for the woman
evidence: Enki spoke to holy Inana
In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu
I will establish ...... in my abzu for the woman

segments.text_en: Inana's lingering suspicion
evidence: Why has this one now entered here?
...... taking the divine powers from me?

segments.text_en: Final blessing and Eridug restored
evidence: May there be ...... a festival!
May the citizens of your city, Inana, the citizens of Unug, live ......!
And as for you, Enki -- may ...... your city, Eridug ......
and has indeed restored ......
